CJ/t.7 (0 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF srfirfes afrfr ;sntrift, wfar:— j*T. %. 11022/3/8tMJ.I ft.*U\] MINISTRY OF HEALTH 4 FAMILY WELFARE (Department of Health) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th August, 1987 , G.SJl. 735(E).—Whereas a draft amendment further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940 (23 of 1940) was published as required by section 330 of the said Act, under the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare No. G.S.R. 1268(E) dated the 8th December, 1986 inviting objections or sugges- tions from all persons likely to bo affected thereby before the expiry of a period of 3 months from the date on which the copies of the Official Gazette containing the said notification Were made available to the public ; And whereas ihe said Gazette was made available to the public on the 29th December, 1986 ; : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] And whereas no objection or suggetious have been received from the- public on the said draft amendment; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 33 O of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act. 1940, the; Ctntrnl Government after consultation with the Ayurvedic, Sl'.ldha and Unani Drugs Technical Advisoiy Board makes the following amendmenl further to amend the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940:— In the First Schedule to the Drugs and Cosmetics Act 1940, (23 of 1940) :— (i) under the heading "A—AYURVEDIC AND S1DDHA SYSTEMS". (a) After serial Number 54, In© following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :— "54—A Ayurvedic Formulary of India (Fart-I)". "54—B Ayurveda Sara Samgraha"; (b) after serial Number 83, the following serial number and entry shall be added, namely:— '•84—Siddha Formulary of India (Part-I)" and (ii) Under the heading "B—UNANI TIBB SYSTEM", after serial number 12, the following serial number entry shall be added, namely :— "13-^atlotial Formulary of Unani Medicina (iPart-I)*'. [No. K-1102213I86-APC] S. K, ALOK, Jt. Secy. PRINTED BY THE MANAGER, GOVT.
